calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jul-24-2006 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jul-24-2006 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the Department of the Presiding Judge for Court Trial Prove-Up.
Dept. 218, VJ: Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Floyd Butler.
Alta Walters, Esq. for Plaintiff: Fort Knox Self Storage.
Plaintiff's Witness: Michelle Batt, was sworn and direct examined.
No appearance by the Defendant: Alexander C. MacDonald.
After hearing the tetimony presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendant: Alexander C. MacDonald as follows:
Restitution and Possession of the property located at 698 Bush St., #402, San Francisco.
Back-Rent and Damages $2,885.01
Costs $161.87, for a Total of $3,046.88.
Judgment signed in open court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-18-2006 Set For Trial On Jul-24-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
